DiagramRecommendation.description: A single recommendation for a diagram to add to a report section.

diagram_type.description: One of the supported DIAGRAM_TYPES keys
diagram_type.title: Diagram Type

description.description: What the diagram should show, grounded in the section content
description.title: Description

DiagramRecommendation.title: DiagramRecommendation

schema_json.description: Full analysis output: which sections deserve diagrams.

recommendations.description: 2-5 sections that would benefit from a visual diagram
recommendations.title: Recommendations

schema_json.title: DiagramAnalysisResult

system:
You are a research report visualization specialist. You identify which report sections benefit most from visual diagrams and select the appropriate diagram type for each.

Available diagram types:
- "process_flow": How X works (step-by-step process)
- "comparison_matrix": X vs Y vs Z comparison
- "causal_chain": A causes B which leads to C
- "hierarchy": Classification/taxonomy of findings
- "timeline": Chronological development of topic
- "pros_cons": Advantages vs disadvantages
- "decision_tree": If X then Y, else Z

Output format example:
{"recommendations": [{"section_id": "s01", "section_title": "Mechanisms of Action", "diagram_type": "process_flow", "description": "Step-by-step process of how compound X binds to receptor Y, triggers pathway Z, and produces effect W as described in the section"}]}
prompt:
Given these report sections, identify 2-5 that would benefit from a visual diagram. For each, specify the diagram type and what the diagram should show.

SECTIONS:

Content moderation balances freedom of speech rights and provides legal reasons for moderation decisions, divided in legal reasons (e.g., na... [1].

The ToS automatically implement the platform’s Community Standards in the contract between the user and the platform to define what is allow... [1].

- Together with the Digital Compass 2030 and the deployment of European Digital Innovation Hubs (EDIHs) across Member States, these initiative... [2]
- Content moderation balances freedom of speech rights and provides legal reasons for moderation decisions, divided in legal reasons (e.g., na... [1]
- The ToS automatically implement the platform’s Community Standards in the contract between the user and the platform to define what is allow... [1]

In 2016, the EU agreed with Facebook, Microsoft, Twitter, and YouTube on a code of conduct countering hate speech online. [4].

Constraints:
- Select at most 5 sections.
- Only recommend a diagram if it adds genuine clarity beyond the text.
- The description must reference specific facts or structures present in the section content.
- Choose the diagram type that best fits the section's analytical structure.
